title: Iveco Urbanway 12 GNV [MTR4]
description:
This project add Belgian Iveco Urbanway 12 GNV Bus

NOTICE:
To install it, please unzip the folder before placing it in your Resourcepacks directory.
body:
This pack introduces the Iveco Urbanway 12 CNG, inspired by the model operating in Liège on line 73 in belgium.
It has been carefully recreated to reflect the design, proportions, and overall feel of the real-life vehicle.
The Iveco Urbanway is a widely used city bus across Europe, known for its reliability, modern design, and environmental performance thanks to its CNG (Compressed Natural Gas) technology. This makes it a common sight in many major cities.
You can find this bus operating in several urban networks, including Brussels, Paris, Lille, Lyon, Nice, Bordeaux, and many other cities, making it a versatile and realistic addition to your transport system.
This pack is perfect for players looking to enhance realism and bring a modern European atmosphere to their game, whether for urban routes, roleplay, or detailed transport networks.
